title: Mario Golf 64 (Dolphin netplay) 3 VS 1 match
description:
Some people asked me to make more video like this and some even when to ask me on discord... (No fucking idea why really...) So I decided to do another one I don't see what's so good about these video, they are fun to play but not to watch at least in my opinion.

Anyway some other people asked me why I didn't use metal mario for my other mario golf video with that 1 VS 1 match I did well this video will show you why, with metal mario and with no input delay I'm really good at this game and any 1 vs 1 would be unfair at least against my friends.

So about this video... What I mean by 3 Vs 1 match is Bowser, Wario and Luigi scores are all combine and so Metal Mario must do a better score than all 3 of them to win.

Metal Mario = Me
Bowser = My sister (Who was the one I had a 1 VS 1 match with she was Peach)
Wario = My brother
Luigi = My brother friend.
